creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: remko->freebsd-bugs

I dont feel any normal time coming up to commit this. I have made 
a couple of very small enhancements to this patch so that it compiles 
on -current, but I didn't get further. 

Since this is a very cool addition, perhaps someone else can get to 
this quicker then I can! (It's a low-fruit item imo).
